content_body: We took our employees to the Cabin for a short business retreat. As soon as we opened the door, the atmosphere of a lit Christmas tree with holiday music playing in the background set the mood for the entire trip. We felt special knowing that someone had taken the time to decorate for us. The Cabin was clean and filled with useful cooking utensils. The morning view of the woods, river and scenic train were beautiful and inspiring. We hope to return for more adventures.
title: Best Work Retreat Ever!
